features: Sensitive skin: Suitable for body, face and hair, this sensitive shower gel with its caring formula has been specially designed to protect against irritation
0% alcohol: The shower gel sensitive skin deserves: NIVEA alcohol-free shower gel cleansing wash doesn't harm the skin due to the pH Skin Balanced mild formula
Bamboo extract: The Bamboo Extract in the sensitive men's shower gel delivers a long-lasting fresh feeling and respects the needs of sensitive skin
How to apply: Simply dispense the desired amount of NIVEA's calming sensitive shower gel onto the palm and massage directly onto wet hair or skin
pH balanced: pH Skin Balanced. Skin compatibility dermatologically approved. Suitable for body, face and hair. Calming formula with a masculine scent
description: NIVEA MEN Sensitive Shower Gel - Respects the needs of sensitive skin NIVEA MEN Sensitive Shower Gel, with its extra gentle formula, has been designed to protect sensitive skin from irritation while showering. The gel is enriched with Bamboo Extract which soothes and calms irritated skin, letting the hair, body and face be cleansed without worrying about skin damage. The mild gel is pH Skin Balanced and skin compatibility dermatologically approved so it is not harsh on skin. The sensitive skin, deep cleansing body wash is the ideal all-in-1 shower solution. Formulated with a light, masculine scent, the gel removes excess oils, grease and any residual styling product from the hair and skin. Application information: Simply squeeze the desired amount onto the palms, lather it up and massage into wet hair/skin before rinsing away residue. Product benefits: Sensitive, mild and gentle formula Masculine fragrance with a fresh and invigorating scent Deep cleanses to leave skin and hair purified All-in-1 formula suitable for face, body and hair 6 x 400ml bottles
